name: technology_predictive_queue_begins_cedar_lib_eq
premise: A canary deployment is burning error budgets; SRE wants an immediate rollback while product insists the experiment is statistically valid. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology predictive queue begins cedar lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Arjun Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Arjun Nielsen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Petrov
agents.identity: I am Harper Petrov, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with equality.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to equality to preserve operational liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Arjun Nielsen must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Arjun Nielsen do?
